reasoning: On August 26, 2025, Wikipedia listed Gukesh Dommaraju's Elo rating as 2776. An increase of at least 1% would require him to reach an Elo of 2803.76 (effectively 2804). Recent results from the 2025 Sinquefield Cup in late August show Gukesh lost classical matches to R. Praggnanandhaa and Wesley So. Since the September FIDE rating list will account for these poor results, his Elo rating in September will certainly drop below 2776, making his chances of being higher on September 7 and September 30 effectively zero. Though he has a stronger chance to recover towards the end of the year or by February 2026, gaining the 35–40+ points required to cross 2804 within a few months is extremely rare at the super-GM level. Therefore, the probability remains very low across all dates, scaling slightly upwards for longer time horizons due to underlying variance over more tournaments.
